pi_items.source: Task description specifies exact survey title to create; verifier.py line 37 checks for survey with this title pattern
Task description requires welcome message to include 'Thank you for participating in our Customer Experience study'; verifier.py line 54 checks for substring 'Customer Experience study'
Task description requires end message to include 'Your feedback helps us improve'; verifier.py line 61 checks for substring 'feedback helps us improve'
Task description specifies exactly 6 questions (Q1-Q6 across 3 groups); verifier.py checks for presence of specific question types but does not enforce minimum count

Task description lists 6 question types: D (Date, Q1), N (Numerical, Q2), F (Array, Q3), R (Ranking, Q4), M (Multiple Choice, Q5), T (Long Free Text, Q6). However, verifier.py only checks for D, N, F, R, M (lines 78-132). No verification code exists for Type T.
Task description specifies 'Set minimum value to 1' for Q2; verifier.py lines 90-92 checks if min_val == '1'
Task description specifies 'Set maximum value to 10000' for Q2; verifier.py lines 92 checks if max_val == '10000'

privileged_info_summary: The cx_journey_advanced_questions task is a synthetic survey creation task using LimeSurvey 6. The agent must create a survey titled 'Customer Experience Journey Survey Q4 2024' with 6 specific questions across 3 groups: a date question, a numerical question (with min=1, max=10000), an array question (5+ sub-items), a ranking question (5+ items), a multiple choice question (5+ items), and a long free text question. The survey must include welcome text containing 'Customer Experience study' and end text containing 'feedback helps us improve', and must be activated. Critical discrepancy: the metadata claims 'required_types' includes 'T' (Long Free Text), but the verifier.py only checks for types D, N, F, R, M and completely omits verification of the Type T question despite the task description requiring it.
